title: Dupatya denudata
intro:
There is no information found on a plant called "Dupatya denudata." However, I found information on the plant "Dupuytrea denudata" which is now known as "Croton lechleri." 

Here's a paragraph about Croton lechleri:

Croton lechleri, also known as "Dragon's Blood," is a plant species native to the Amazon rainforest. It has been used in traditional medicine for its potential health benefits, including wound healing, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The bioactive constituents of Croton lechleri include flavonoids, terpenoids, and anthraquinones, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Croton lechleri include tinctures, capsules, and ointments, which are often used to support skin health and wound healing.
taxonomy: Dupatya denudata, also known as the Naked Dupatya, is a species within the family Anacardiaceae.
